skill.name: philsquare-permissions
skill.author: philsquare
skill.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "add permissions to a policy", "create a policy with roles", "set up role permissions", "configure rolePermissions", "use BasePolicy", or when working with Laravel policies that need role-based permission management. Also activate when creating or modifying policies in a project using philsquare/permissions.
